goal: Ship 5 TH suit-page mirrors at /th/tarot-card-meanings/{major,cups,wands,swords,pentacles} so TH crawlers and users have proper slug pages instead of being redirected to the ?category= SPA query-param form on the TH index
done: Three-layer bundle: (1) Extended js/suit-page.js with SUIT_COPY_TH constant (5 suits × full intro/element/themes/highlights/guide.steps/faqLead/faqs in Thai) plus a module-level isThaiPage detector that branches config lookup, SEO description, canonical/hreflang, BreadcrumbList items, CollectionPage inLanguage + about Things, hero title source + eyebrow, FAQ title, chip labels + card-count format, getCardSummary field selection. Card grid names + alt-text kept English per user preference (matches established TH index quick-chip convention). (2) Created 5 new TH HTML mirror files at th/tarot-card-meanings/{cups,wands,swords,pentacles,major}.html — each 120 lines, full Thai static chrome (breadcrumb 3 items, hero eyebrow, h1, count label, section eyebrows + headings + leads, view-toggle Grid/List + aria-label, FAQ eyebrow + title), correct canonical/hreflang/og:url, data-suit set per suit, data-page='suit'. (3) Added 5 <url> entries to sitemap.xml matching the EN suit-entry format (<loc> + <lastmod> only, no changefreq/priority). hreflang triad on EN suit pages now correctly points to the TH slug pages instead of the legacy ?category= form (runtime override updated, static HTML in previous commit)
notes: Original spec was sitemap-only + 3 lines of isThaiPage; halt-and-flag surfaced that TH card grid would still show EN names/summaries and TH page chrome would be half-localized. User confirmed comprehensive extension; final isThaiPage usage is 19× across the file. Card grid names + alt-text reverted to EN-only after user clarification ('switch back to EN card names') — established TH index already uses English card names in quick-chips, so this matches voice. Thai summaries (reading_summary_preview_th -> tarot_imply_th -> meaning_th) still flow into card grid. SUIT_COPY_TH inlining technically conflicts with CLAUDE.md hard rule 3 (i18n via common.js) but matches existing js/meanings.js precedent for bulk feature-specific content tables — flagged for the user, accepted. data-page='suit' shared between EN /tarot-card-meanings/cups.html and TH /th/tarot-card-meanings/cups.html mirrors the same data-page='daily' collision noted in [[project_meowtarot_data_page_collision]] but is safe here because both URLs are separate page loads (no SPA toggle between EN/TH suit pages on the same URL — locale switcher only operates at /th/ vs / root). sitemap entries match EN suit format (<loc> + <lastmod> only).
